title: B.Ed Jobs 2026 – Special Educator, Resource Person and More
location: Daman and Diu, Daman and Diu
shortInfo: Government Schools & Samagra Shiksha Diu Recruitment 2026 for 26 posts of Various Staff and Teachers. The Walk-in on 28-05-2026. For detailed information please visit Government Schools & Samagra Shiksha Diu official website.

basic_details.short_information: Government Schools & Samagra Shiksha Diu Recruitment 2026 for 26 posts of Various Staff and Teachers. The Walk-in on 28-05-2026. For detailed information please visit Government Schools & Samagra Shiksha Diu official website.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the Government Schools & Samagra Shiksha Diu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.details: Resource Person for CWSN: Graduate with B.Ed. (Special Education) or equivalent. B.Ed. (General) with one-year Diploma in Special Education, B.Ed. (General) with two-year Diploma in Special Education, B.Ed. (General) with Post Graduate Professional Diploma in Special Education (PGPD), B.Ed. Special Education and Post Graduate Professional Certificate in Special Education (PGPC), PG Diploma in Special Education (Mental Retardation), or any other equivalent qualification approved by RCI. Candidate must be registered with RCI. Minimum 2 years' experience in related field (Desirable). Academic Resource Person for Career Counselling: Minimum at-least Graduation with a certificate/diploma in Career Counselling/PG Diploma in Counselling, or Masters in Psychology. Preferred minimum of one-year experience in providing career/educational counselling to students at schools. If graduate with diploma, at least five years of teaching/counselling experience. If masters, one-year of relevant experience. Primary School Teacher (English Medium): Senior Secondary (class XII pass) with at least 50% marks and 2 years Diploma in Elementary Education (by whatever name known). Senior Secondary (Class XII pass) with at least 45% marks and 2 year Diploma in Elementary Education (by whatever name known), in accordance with the NCTE (Recognition Norms and Procedure) Regulations, 2002. Senior Secondary (Class XII pass) with at least 50% marks and 4 year Bachelor of Elementary Education (B.El.Ed.). Senior Secondary (Class XII pass) with at least 50% marks and 2 year Diploma in Education (Special Education). Graduation and 2 years Diploma in Elementary Education (by whatever name known). Graduation with at least 50% marks and Bachelor of Education (B. Ed.). Candidate should have studied in the concerned medium at Secondary level. Upper Primary School Teacher (English Medium): Passed the Teacher Eligibility Test (TET) conducted by Central Government OR any State Govt. in India. Graduation in B.A./B.Sc./B.Com. and 2 years Diploma in Elementary Education (by whatever name known). B.A./B.Sc./B.Com. with at least 50% marks and one year Bachelor in Education (B.Ed.). B.A./B.Sc./B.Com. with at least 45% marks and one year Bachelor in Education (B.Ed.) in accordance with the NCTE (Recognition norms and Procedure) Regulations. Senior Secondary (Class XII Pass) with at least 50% marks and 04 years Bachelor in Elementary Education (B. El. Ed.). Senior Secondary (Class XII Pass) with at least 50% marks and 04 years B.A. Ed./ B.Sc. Ed./B.Com. Ed. B.A./B.Sc./B.Com. with at least 50% marks and B.Ed (Special Education). The candidate should have studied in the concerned medium at Secondary level. Part Time Instructor (MUSIC): 12th class or its equivalent examination with at least 50% marks from recognized board. Degree/Diploma/certificate in music from a recognized university/institution. Part Time Instructor (Health & Physical Instructor): 12th class or its equivalent examination with at least 50% mark from recognized board. Intermediate Education/Graduation and Under Graduate Diploma in Physical Education/B.P.Ed. from a recognized institution. Work Education Instructor (Computer): 12th class or its equivalent examination with at least 50% mark from recognized board. Bachelor of Computer Application from Government recognized university or institute. B.Sc. (Computer) or B.Sc. (IT) from Government recognized university or institute. Bachelor degree with PGDCA from Government recognized university or institute. Special Educator (Secondary): Graduate with B.Ed. (Special Education). B.Ed. (General) with one-year Diploma in Special Education. B.Ed. (General) with two-year Diploma in Special Education. B.Ed. (General) with Post Graduate Professional Diploma in Special Education (PGPD). B.Ed. Special Education and Post Graduate Professional Certificate in Special Education (PGPC). PG Diploma in Special Education (Mental Retardation). B.Ed. (Special Education) in respective category or its equivalent from a RCI recognised institute and must be registered with RCI. Minimum 2 years' experience in related field (Desirable).

vacancy_details.Post Name: Special Educator, Resource Person and More

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies announced by Government Schools & Samagra Shiksha Diu?
faq.answer: Government Schools & Samagra Shiksha Diu has announced a total of 26 vacancies for various Staff and Teachers posts.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: When is the Walk-in Interview date?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 28th May 2026.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification ranges from 12th pass with specific diplomas/degrees to Graduate and Post Graduate degrees with B.Ed. or equivalent, depending on the post.

faq.question: What is the salary range for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The salaries range from Rs. 12,100/- to Rs. 27,000/- per month, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit varies by post, generally up to 35 years, with relaxations as per Central Government rules.

faq.question: Are there any specific requirements for Special Educator posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for Special Educator posts, RCI registration is required, and specific qualifications in Special Education are necessary.

faq.question: What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What are the official websites to check for more information?
faq.answer: The official websites are www.ddd.gov.in, www.dnh.gov.in, and www.diu.gov.in.
